message:
test(policy_dsl): add 10 bridge compiler property tests

Extends proptest_policy_dsl.rs from 36 to 46 tests with coverage for
compile_rule_match / decompile_to_match / compile_policy_rule:

- compile_empty_match_is_always: empty PolicyRuleMatch → Always
- compile_decompile_roundtrip_{actions,actors,surfaces,pane_ids}: single-field roundtrips
- compile_decompile_roundtrip_multi_field: multi-field roundtrip
- compile_policy_rule_preserves_decision: decision/id/priority preservation
- or_not_predicates_cannot_decompile: OR/NOT → None
- never_predicate_cannot_decompile: Never → None
- compiled_predicate_evaluates_consistently: evaluate vs evaluate_with_trace agreement

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
